intro: Pack your bags! Start your journey today, no luggage or visa required!
description:
With stunning graphics, a modernized interface, new object search modes, and more content than ever, it’s the ultimate European adventure, no passport required!

Discover iconic landmarks, hidden corners, and the unique charm of Europe, all from the comfort of your home.

Game features:
- 30 unique locations – Explore scenic cities, natural wonders, and cultural landmarks across Europe. Each level is a beautifully illustrated masterpiece full of hidden objects.
- New search features – Enjoy enhanced gameplay with new object types and interactive mechanics that keep the experience fresh and engaging.
- Redesigned interface – A clean, user friendly UI makes navigation and play smoother and more enjoyable.
- Mini-Games and puzzles – Take on a variety of logic, memory, and observation challenges between hidden object levels.
- Souvenir collection – Collect meaningful items that reflect the spirit and culture of every country you visit.

Collector’s Edition Includes:
- 13 Bonus Locations – Unlock even more colorful scenes and hidden object challenges.
- 7 Extra Mini-Games + 12 Bonus Puzzles – Nearly 20 additional brain-teasing challenges for true hidden object fans.
- Expanded Souvenir Collection – Discover even more collectibles as you explore Europe in depth.
